---
title: "CY350 Computer Networks"
lightbox: true
format:
  html:
    other-links:
      - text: GitHub Repository
        icon: github
        href: https://github.com/usma-eecs/cy350-2026-2
      - text: Python Tutorial
        icon: book
        href: https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/
navbar: false
listing:
  - id: content
    type: grid
    sort:
      - date
      - filename asc
    grid-columns: 4
    page-size: 50
    contents:
        - content/*.qmd
        - labs/*.qmd
  - id: slides
    type: grid
    sort: date
    grid-columns: 4
    contents:
        - slides/*.qmd
---

This course provides an introduction to computer networks from both a theoretical and software design perspective. The goal is to provide the basic concepts necessary to understand the design and operation of computer networks and gain experience writing programs that use the network. Each level of the TCP/IP protocol stack is examined in detail with a heavy emphasis on socket programming, theoretical foundations, and cybersecurity implications.

## Course Content

::: {#content}
:::

## Lesson Slides

::: {#slides}
:::

## Course Resources

All the resources listed below are considered common knowledge and do not need to be cited.

### Where to get the textbook

- [Computer Networking (pearson.com)](https://www.pearson.com/en-us/subject-catalog/p/computer-networking/P200000003334/9780135928615)
- [Computer Networking: A Top-Down Approach: James Kurose: 9789356061316: Amazon.com: Books](https://www.amazon.com/Computer-Networking-Top-Down-James-Kurose/dp/9356061319)
- [Amazon.com: Computer Networking [RENTAL EDITION]: 9780136681557: James Kurose: Books](https://www.amazon.com/Computer-Networking-James-Kurose/dp/0136681557)
- See Modules > Course Resources

### Textbook Assistance Websites

- [Textbook Companion Website](https://media.pearsoncmg.com/ph/esm/ecs_kurose_compnetwork_8/cw/)
- [Author Website](https://gaia.cs.umass.edu/kurose_ross/index.php)

### Guides and Documentation

- [Python 3 Documentation](https://docs.python.org/3/)
  - Also at [DevDocs.io](https://devdocs.io/python~3.14/), you can enable offline access and search across multiple languages and libraries.
- [Python f-strings](https://fstring.help/)
- [Python Notes for Professionals](https://goalkicker.com/PythonBook/)
- [Linux Notes for Professionals](https://goalkicker.com/LinuxBook/)
- [CY350 Linux Setup Guide](https://usma-eecs.github.io/linux-guide/)
- [CY350 Python Refresher](https://usma-eecs.github.io/python-refresher/)

## Course Schedule

{{< include schedule.md >}}
